Discover China’s New Cryptocurrency with the Official Yuan Pay Group Platform!

Cryptocurrencies have been around since 2009, providing a unique and efficient method for trading.Overall, every crypto is available in most countries worldwide, making them extremely accessible assets. However, it’s important to note that some governments still have some regulations on cryptocurrencies, making it harder for people to get them.

This is the case with China. While crypto is not particularly illegal in this country, it has specific regulations that most of its people must be aware of. For example, in September 2017, Initial Coin Offerings (ICO) was banned in China, which forced several crypto platforms and exchange websites to close down to avoid legal problems.

Many Chinese people don’t understand whether cryptos are legal or illegal in the country. You may hold cryptocurrencies if you like, but the Chinese banking system doesn’t currently accept any cryptocurrencies as a tool for retail payments. In other words, you may not exchange cryptocurrencies without official authorization unless the transactions benefit the “real economy.”

However, this has been slowly changing due to cryptocurrencies becoming more popular in the digital era. Today, you can find a cryptocurrency sale reasonably quickly, which means that buyers can acquire them from anywhere they are.

A few years ago, China’s Central Bank (also known as the People’s Bank of China) started to consider developing a digital asset that could compete with crypto, and eventually, converting China into a completely digital financial system. 

While China’s cryptocurrency works as one, it’s not exactly a cryptocurrency; this new type of digital asset is called a “Central Bank Digital Currency,” or “CBDC.” In a nutshell, a CBDC is a digital currency issued by a government’s central bank, and it allows you to make transactions as long as they comply with the law.

China’s crypto has been studied and tested for several years now, but it’s starting to show its potential now. In fact, China is expected to become one of the first significant economies worldwide to release a CBDC to the public.

The main thing that differentiates the digital Yuan from any other cryptocurrency is that the former is centralized, meaning that there’s a government entity managing the asset and its transactions. Most cryptocurrencies are decentralized, making them more accessible for the average user.

While the centralized aspect of the digital Yuan can be considered as negative for some people, it’s still seeing significant growth over the past few months. Since the country’s primary goal is to fully convert its economy to a digital one, it’s only a matter of time until other countries start to do the same.

LEARN MORE ABOUT YUAN PAY GROUP'S SERVICES

What is the Yuan Pay Group?

Yuan Pay Group is a dynamic trading platform that acts as a focal point for traders seeking opportunities in the crypto markets, with a special focus on trading the digital Yuan's value. Thanks to its comprehensive suite of features, Yuan Pay Group has positioned itself as a go-to destination for those looking to explore a wide range of trading possibilities.

Why Yuan International?

You may be wondering what the Yuan International is and what it can do for you as a trader.

As of today, you can use the platform to make any kind of crypto transactions, including those involving the new China coin.

As mentioned before, China has been the leading manufacturer in many areas for years; it was only natural for the government to start investing in the digital currency world. The goal of the Yuan International is to teach you as much as they can about this new cryptocurrency and how it differs from other trading assets available today.

Keep in mind that the Chinese government has never backed any crypto in history. Considering the fact that China is now looking to transform into a nation with an entirely digital currency, it’s likely for investors to take an interest in it. Since investors are taking a closer look at China for its crypto.

Few years ago, China handed out $1.5 million worth of its digital Yuan for testing. People were allowed to download an app to their smartphone, receive the crypto, and spend it at over 3,000 merchants in a Shenzhen district. However, this event was a lottery made by the Chinese government, making the asset more exclusive for those who won. Given that, it’s safe to say that acquiring the digital Yuan is not easy at all.

How Does Yuan Global Work?

The Yuan Global offers a trading platform that allows you to invest your fiat currencies in order to trade on the China coin.

It’s important to note that this asset is still being tested by the Chinese government, and as stated before, not everyone has access to it. Many scammers without authorization have taken the opportunity to offer the China coin to investors, which can end in fraudulent transactions.

The best thing about Yuan Global is that it’s not limited to Chinese residents. If you live in another country, but you want to try out the platform, you’re allowed to do so. However, the team advises you to be careful with your investment since this is a relatively new asset, and its value may drastically change over time.

On the other hand, their developers worked hard towards providing a smooth browsing experience on the Yuan Pay Group platform wherever you are; this means that you may access the platform either on your computer or smartphone, as long as you are connected to the internet. And you needn’t worry: the website is highly optimized to work on both desktop and mobile devices.

To recap, the Yuan Pay Group platform can provide you with all the tools necessary to get you trading on the new Chinese coin. However, you need to do research on your end if you want to learn more about trading. Remember that this asset is still new, and many things are waiting to be discovered. And still, your capital is at risk with every trade.

Overall, here’s what you can get if you decide registering to Yuan Pay Group:

  • Secure and efficient trading platform.
  • Access to trading on the Chinese coin.
  • Desktop and mobile access to the website.
  • Intuitive user interface.
  • Straightforward sign-up process.
LEARN MORE

How to Register to Yuan Pay Group?

If you’re interested in joining the trading platform, make sure to read the following section and follow these steps carefully:

Step One – Registration

First, if you choose to continue you need to click on the “Register Account” button at the end of this page; that button is going to redirect you to a registration form that you have to fill out with your contact information. Make sure that the information is accurate since it will be used to create your new trading account.

Normally, the platform only requires your first and last name, e-mail address, and phone number. After you fill out everything, you’re going to receive an e-mail with the final steps for verifying your account.

Step Two – Investing

After you’ve finished creating your account, an account manager from the broker’s website will be in touch to explain the platform and lay out the option of trading through the platform, then you’ll be redirected to the platform. Once there, you can start reading more about how the Chinese cryptocurrency works before you begin trading.

You need to educate yourself on this new asset as thoroughly as possible so that you can understand all the risks that may come with your investment. Keep in mind that assessing your risks is a good way to make a smart financial decision and trade responsibly on these coins.

When you’re done, you can fund your account with any amount you consider appropriate and start trading on the digital Yuan.

Step Three – Trading on the Chinese Coin

Make sure to follow all the instructions provided by the platform so that you can properly set up your trading account. If you want to take things as safely as possible, it’s suggested that you start with a small amount.

LEARN MORE ABOUT THE YUAN PAY GROUP’S SERVICES

Frequently Asked Questions

Since this new asset is changing the way in which people perceive economics, it’s natural to have several questions about it. You’re advised not to start trading before you’ve found answers to all the questions you have about this Chinese coin.

There are several questions the team regularly receives from their potential users, so they decided to include them in this FAQ list, for your benefit. Keep in mind that this is a constantly evolving asset, so the team is going to keep updating the list as more information is obtained.

If you have any pending questions regarding the digital Yuan or the Yuan Global trading platform, keep reading!

Does the Yuan Global Charge Any Fees?

Currently, the platform doesn’t charge you any fees, funding your account, or making a withdrawal. While most trading platforms may charge you fees for using their service, which can be exhausting or overwhelming, Yuan Pay Group chose to make their platform entirely free for you.

Can You Begin Trading Whenever You Want?

Many beginners believe that they can’t start trading on an asset because they’re more prone to making mistakes. The main mistake that you can make as a trader is beginning to trade without properly researching the asset; to avoid that, it’s highly recommended to practice your strategies before you implement them into your trading sessions with the partnered broker.

Taking that into account, it’s safe to say that you can begin trading whenever you want, as long as you feel prepared for it. If a particular strategy doesn’t work for you at first, you can learn from it and use another one in the future; that way, you’re constantly developing.

Discover More About the Platform of Yuan International

At first glance, it may seem like another cryptocurrency, but if you take a closer look at it, you’re going to notice several things that make it unique compared to other platforms. Digital currencies are often considered the future of economics, so if you haven’t started to learn more about them. This is Your Time to learn more with Yuan International and see the bigger picture.

Important Risk Note:

Trading can generate notable benefits; however, it also involves a risk of partial/full funds loss and should be considered by initial investors. Around 70 percent of the investors will lose money.

#Yuan Pay Group and any other commercial names used on the site are for commercial purposes only, and do not refer to any specific company nor specific services providers.

The video is for commercial presentation and illustration purposes only, and all participants are actors.

Carefully read the terms & conditions and disclaimer page of the third-party investor platform before investing. users must be cognizant of their individual capital gain tax liability in their country of residence. It is against the law to solicit United States persons to buy and sell commodity options, even if they are called ‘prediction' contracts unless they are listed for trading and traded on a CFTC-registered exchange or unless legally exempt.

The Financial Conduct Authority (‘FCA’) has issued a policy statement PS20/10, which prohibits the sale, promotion, and distribution of CFD on Crypto assets. It is prohibiting the dissemination of marketing materials relating to distribution of CFDs and other financial products based on Cryptocurrencies and which are addressed to UK residents

There are several trading options that the trader/user can use – by trading software, using human brokers, or by making own trades and it's the trader’s sole responsibility to choose and decide what is the right way for him/her to trade.
